result.markdown: --- title: "Week 6: Exponential smoothing" --- ::: {.cell} ::: ## What you will learn this week * Exponential smoothing methods with trend and seasonality * ETS models * Automatic model selection using the AICc ## Pre-seminar activities Read [Sections 8.3-8.7 of the textbook](https://otexts.com/fpp3/expsmooth.html) and watch all embedded videos. ## Tutorial exercises - Complete Exercises 5, 7, 11, 14 from [Section 8.8 of the book](https://otexts.com/fpp3/expsmooth-exercises.html). - [Tutorial learning objectives](tute-lo.qmd). ## Assignments * [GA2](../assignments/G2.qmd) is due on Tuesday 14 April. * [IA3](../assignments/A3.qmd) is due on Friday 24 April. ## Weekly quiz * [Week 6 quiz](https://learning.monash.edu/mod/quiz/view.php?id=3868) is due on Wednesday 15 April.
